info.english_meaning: to explain to elaborate to spread to praise to glow to shine
info.hindI_arTa: varRana karanA vistfta karanA PElAnA praSaMsA karanA camakanA prakASita karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'rAjAnaM rAjaputraM vA saMvarRayati yaH sadA' (BA॰4.39) saMvarRayati=stOti atrArTe samA nArTaH saMvartayatIti pAWe'nusaratItyarTaH
'tasmAd yadadya stotreRa guRanirvarRana tvimO' (vi0 pu0 11148) iha nirvarRanaM vistaraSo varRane'rTe prayuktam
'harzarAjASrayA carcAkaTA vTAvarRayizyate' (rAja0 7873) vyAvarRayizyate upavarRayizyate vistareRa varRayizyate
